title: HIS & HERS
overview: Two estranged spouses — one a detective, the other a news reporter — vie to solve a murder in which each believes the other is a prime suspect.
reason: A Netflix hit with a strong 7.2 IMDb rating from over 65,000 votes, featuring popular actors Tessa Thompson and Jon Bernthal.

title: Wonder Man
overview: Simon and Trevor, two actors at opposite ends of their careers, chase life-changing roles.
reason: A highly anticipated Marvel Studios series on Disney+ with a 7.5 IMDb rating and over 27,000 votes, starring Emmy winner Yahya Abdul-Mateen II.

title: All Her Fault
overview: In Chicago, Marissa Irvine arrives at 14 Arthur Avenue, expecting to pick up her young son Milo from his first playdate with a boy at his new school. But the woman who answers the door isn't a mother she recognizes. She isn't the nanny. She doesn't have Milo. And so begins every parent's worst nightmare.
reason: Critically well-received with a 7.5 IMDb rating from nearly 39,000 votes, elevated by Emmy-winning lead Sarah Snook.

title: Steal
overview: A typical day at Lochmill Capital is upended when armed thieves burst in and force Zara and her best friend Luke to execute their demands. In the aftermath, conflicted detective Rhys races against time to find out who stole £4 billion pounds of people's pensions and why.

title: The Beast in Me
overview: A famous author is pulled into a twisted mind game with her rich, powerful new neighbor — who might be a murderer.
reason: Highly rated on Netflix with a 7.4 IMDb score from over 61,000 votes, starring acclaimed Emmy winners Claire Danes and Matthew Rhys.
